U ^.-12014/2/2003-^FTH (^T) J TO f ^ " i u f l . — ^ 3rf*rg^rr fc*ii=k 1 "sn^rt, 2003 % u ^ r . s r r . 1 (3T)%?r?cr*[rccr%TFTO, arcmOT^srafftRr ^ W *ft $KW% $*& W M ^Tt«Hf^TT^28 W i t f , 2003 % U ^3TT. 247(3T), " f e ^ l O 3#T, 2003%H ^T.3TL 430(3?) 3T)T P^i+ 27 "+iW<l, 2004%U^3TT. 270(^T) %^ctf=R^ MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) ORDER New Delhi, the 20th October, 2004 S.O. 1170(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) and sub-section (5) of Section 30 of the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments further to amend the Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003, namely: 1. (I) This Order may be called the Tea (Marketing) Control (Second Amendment) Order, 2004. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003, paragraph 25 shall be omitted. [F. No. T-I2014/2/2003-Plant(A)J ABHIjrr SENGUPTA, Addl. Secy. , Foot Note.—The principal notification was published vide No. S.O. 1(E) datedthe 1st January, 2003 in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary and subsequently amended vide No. S.O. 247(E) datedthe 28thFebmary, 2003, No. S.O. 430(E) dated 10th April, 2003 and No. S.O. 270(E) dated 27th February2004.
